spec.name: Main Road
spec.description: This place leaves you very unimpressed. And bored. You are definitely bored by this place. The people are listless, going about their daily chores with a slowness that pains your eyes. A slope to the west climbs up the mountainside, and two open shops made of wood and stone are to your north and south. East-wards this road continues. There is a small sign here.
